report_metadata.report_title: Malicious Listener for Ivanti Endpoint Mobile Management Systems

tools.name: ReflectUtil.class
tools.evidence_snippet: ReflectUtil.class injects and manages SecurityHandlerWanListener in Apache Tomcat.

tools.name: Loader 2
tools.evidence_snippet: Loader 2 contains and loads the compiled Java class file WebAndroidAppInstaller.class at runtime.

ttps.technique: Obfuscated Files or Information: Embedded Payloads

ttps.evidence_snippet: Loader 1 masquerades ReflectUtil.class as part of the org.apache.http package.
ReflectUtil.class decodes and decompresses a class bytecode.

summary: CISA analyzed two sets of malware from an organization compromised by cyber threat actors exploiting CVE-2025-4427 and CVE-2025-4428 in Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile (Ivanti EPMM) deployments for initial access.
